scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p e2e/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p qa/runner/tsconfig.json && turbo run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run build && vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project=unit
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build && vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project=integration
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
